sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58676" key="kolokunqia/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κολοκυνθ-ιάς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">άδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n58676.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">made from gourds</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">βρωτύς</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.371</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pall.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
